title: The Arctic Is Melting
summary: Arctic Initiative Postdoctoral Fellow Sarah Mackie gave a presentation to Girlguiding Newcastle (the equivalent of Girl Scouts in the UK), where she is a Ranger leader, about the Arctic, how climate change is affecting it, and what everyone (particularly children) can do to help.
body: Arctic Initiative Postdoctoral Fellow Sarah Mackie gave a presentation to Girlguiding Newcastle, where she is a Ranger leader, about the Arctic, how climate change is affecting it, and what everyone (particularly children) can do to help.
